prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: TAC-HANDCUFF-50-PACK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 50-Pack American Universal Handcuff Key Description: Doesn't get much simpler than this; if you're law enforcement or security, the ASR Tactical Universal Handcuff Key fits most all professional and standard locking handcuffs

Extremely durable. Constructed from high grade stainless steel, these handcuff keys are made to be used daily and are the same standard issue hand cuff keys issued by law enforcement. Search Terms: universal handcuff key steel handcuffs police office bulk hand cuff keys corrections jailer army mp everyday carry set of duty belt keys Features: - Universal Handcuff Key with Back Pin for Double Locking Handcuffs - Standard Issue Law Enforcement Police Handcuff Key - Each multpack includes a key ring - Package Includes: (1) Key Ring | (50) Keys - Made to be Used, this is a Strong, Reliable, well Built Handcuff Key === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Standard Issue Law Enforcement, Stainless Steel, Universal Fit, Double Locking, Includes Key Ring

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel, Back Pin For Double Locking, Law Enforcement Standard Issue, Includes Key Ring, Daily Use
